changelog: Skill consolidation — drop the `-writer` convention, fold the planning-pipeline doc-producers. The `-writer` suffix correlated with nothing (3 skills, 2 unrelated archetypes), so instead of normalizing it the planning-pipeline TEXT docs are consolidated into ONE skill and the genuine design disciplines stay self-contained. Changes (23->21 skills): (1) FOLD `project-context` + `epic-writer` into `project-planning` — their templates move to `project-planning/assets/`, guidance to `references/{project-context,backlog}.md`, trigger keywords merged into the description; the two skill dirs are deleted. (2) RENAME `architecture-writer`->`architecture` and rewrite its body into a genuine software-architecture discipline (decision framework, style selection, -ilities as first-class, ADR discipline, evolutionary design, smells) — self-contained, keeps its own template. (3) RENAME `ux-designer` SKILL->`ux-design` (the `ux-designer` AGENT keeps its name — resolves the skill/agent collision). (4) RENAME `article-writer`->`ghostwriting`, `writing-skills`->`skill-authoring` (garden-path fix). (5) system-builder now documents the two skill archetypes (doc-producer vs technique/prose) and cross-links the skeletons. BREAKING for downstream adopters: `template-updater.js` is additive-only, so the 5 renamed/folded skill dirs persist as orphans on update — run verify-after-sync (set-diff `skills/` vs source; reconcile agent `skills:` lists). Swept all wiring: scaffold `SKILL_TEMPLATE_MANIFEST`, agent frontmatter (architect/doc-writer/project-planner/shadow/ux-designer), CLAUDE.md, system-map, concepts, commands, guides, and 4 test-fixture files. Gate: 1520 passing.
